projects.name: E-Commerce Platform
projects.description: A full-stack e-commerce platform with real-time inventory, payment processing, and admin dashboard. Built with Next.js and Stripe integration.

projects.name: Task Management App
projects.description: A collaborative task management application with real-time updates, drag-and-drop functionality, and team collaboration features.

projects.name: Weather Dashboard
projects.description: A beautiful weather dashboard with location-based forecasts, interactive maps, and severe weather alerts.

projects.name: Portfolio Template
projects.description: A modern, customizable portfolio template for developers. Features dark mode, animations, and easy content management.

projects.name: Blog Platform
projects.description: A headless CMS-powered blog platform with MDX support, syntax highlighting, and SEO optimization.

projects.name: Analytics Dashboard
projects.description: A real-time analytics dashboard with customizable widgets, data visualization, and export capabilities.
